scope: bench prototype procurement checklist; no supplier checkout or farm-private data
must_confirm_before_purchase: shipping country and local voltage/connector availability
pump chemical compatibility for future fertilizer only after water tests pass
hose inner diameter matching pump, filter, valves, and nozzle holders
Pixhawk-compatible sensor interface voltage before wiring

items.description: 12 V DC diaphragm sprayer pump with pressure switch
11002-class 110-degree flat-fan agricultural spray tips plus caps/holders
must_have_specs: compatible cap/holder included or purchased separately

items.description: 12 V normally-closed solenoid valves for left/right zones
opto-isolated MOSFET or relay driver board with flyback protection
water pressure transducer or high/low pressure switch
must_have_specs: output readable by Pixhawk/RPi through safe ADC/interface

items.description: tank float switch or non-contact liquid level sensor
physical emergency stop, fuse holders, 12 V distribution, wire, terminals, waterproof connectors
must_have_specs: wire gauge sized for pump current
reject_if: shared noisy actuator power with Pixhawk logic

items.description: tank fittings, suction filter, pressure gauge, tubing, clamps, check valves, tee fittings, nozzle holders
must_have_specs: hose and clamps match all ports
preferred_specs: transparent test tubing for bench only

items.description: Pixhawk kit, RC override, telemetry radio, GPS/compass, optional Raspberry Pi supply
must_have_specs: logic BEC/buck supply separate from actuator rail

inspection_rule: Every required item must have must_have_specs and reject_if criteria checked before purchase.
forbidden: recording real farm coordinates or private supplier account data in the repo
buying chemical/fertilizer before water-only bench PASS
purchasing actuator loads that would be powered directly from Pixhawk pins
